title: Stech Clarity-Driven Feedback Transformer (SCDFT)
description: Transform raw, harsh, or emotional feedback into clear, structured, manager‑ready reports. Each item refined one‑by‑one. Upload CSV or provide a JSON array. SCDFT preserves all criticism and delivers total clarity, converting chaotic language into actionable, professional text.

csvFile.title: CSV File (optional)
csvFile.description: Upload a CSV file. You can use your existing company CSV without renaming columns.

feedbacks.title: Feedback Array (optional)
feedbacks.description: Alternative to CSV: provide an array of feedback objects. All fields except originalFeedback are optional.

prefill.originalFeedback: His work is a mess. Deadlines keep slipping. I'm tired of saying the same things over and over.

originalFeedback.title: Original Feedback
originalFeedback.description: The raw feedback or complaint you want to refine.

context.title: Context (optional)
context.description: Type of feedback (performance review, customer complaint, product review, public report).

recipientName.title: Recipient Name (optional)
recipientName.description: Name of the recipient. If provided, SCDFT will address them respectfully.

defaultTone.title: Default Tone
defaultTone.description: Fallback tone if not specified per item.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of feedback items to process simultaneously (1-20).

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Max wait time per feedback request.
